rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). The cited rule governs cybersecurity and AI training requirements for state and local government employees. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Each state agency shall identify state employees who use a computer to complete at least 25 percent of the employee's required duties.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text pertains to cybersecurity/AI training and has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
